title: Porky's Legacy: Era of Corruption (HORROR)
description: Be careful… In the valley you can't distinguish well their motivations when they have been fully consumed by the fog.
body:
_**DON'T LOOK BACK!**_
  _You can't trust anybody, not even **yourself…**_
# !! IMPORTANT !!
_Before you complain about **“THE GAME CRASHES AND MY WORLD DOESN'T OPEN”**, PLEASE! Read this [POST](https://www.youtube.com/post/Ugkx0DMnf7HcL982bAbrCt1c2NQMu52-bVnI) I've made on YT ; )_

If you're planning on doing a video review of the mod, please consider reading this [POST](https://www.youtube.com/post/Ugkxkkx7z6-gNmRtO_adZxKFtOwTncwbVR5G).

_Keep in mind that using shaders can break certain effects of the mod, such as the fog, internal shaders, etc. Those things cannot be altered by the mod (especially for each shader) and depend on the shader's code and how it treats features such as fog colors, distance, etc…_

_We should also mention that we are aware of a bug caused by “dying” in “SAMSIDE” with [SAFE MODE]. In some cases, this causes a fake credits screen to appear when re-entering. Although it is not a serious bug (because it does not overwrite the “seenCredits” variable within MC and is even as simple to avoid as pressing the “ESC” key), but it is true that in some cases it can be annoying and, above all, tacky._

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Also, I must clarify that there's only one part where the mod is able to check if you have OBS running; it's only used for an Easter egg of 4th-wall breaking and won't change anything of the main gameplay.
</details>

# DESCRIPTION
_People keep disappearing into the dense fog that surrounds those valleys. They follow the voices that come from them. Voices that are usually those of those who are no longer with them.
Who is behind these actions is unknown, but their true intentions are hidden behind this thick fog._

The main focus of the mod is the Ominous Valley, a new biome where you can find a new wood type, flowers, structures, and even more content (that **Mojang** left deeper in the fog). But since V3.0 some other biomes joined, such as “Hazed Plains”.

## There are 3 rules in THIS game… (or maybe there are 4 (?)):
- _**DeadtimeSpawnChance**: Which would make Deadtime Jones spawn more._
- _**AreYouScared**: Which would enable the fear bar in the game._
- _**SafeMode (added in V3.0 AND REMOVED IN V4.0 (DETAILS OF THIS ON MY WEBSITE!))** : Avoids your world getting corrupted after HIS sequence; it will crash your game anyway and remove your inventory, but at least your world is saved, right? ; )_
- _**AllowCorruptedPlague (Added in V4.0)**: Which allows Corruptinies to spread even further by multiplying themselves inside “Corrupted Spores”._

The Fear bar is just here to **improve** the experience, or even make it harder; it rises or lowers depending on the mobs nearby, the biomes where you are, and even dimensions. But most importantly, the **LIGHT** if you want a challenge, I'll recommend you to enable it, at least try it ; ).

But be careful; if your fear increases to **MAX**, something may happen, and I'll only say that thing can end your run **LITERALLY**. (Unless you've got your [SAFE MODE] enabled…)
# WHAT TO EXPECT
This is an official spin-off mod of _Porky's Legacy_, more focused on horror than cheap PNG jumpscares (like the **ORIGINAL** one). _(Well, NGL, this mod is more focused on making fun and parody than scaring XD. STOP SAYING MY CREATURES AREN'T SCARY, OR I'LL CRY >:( )._

The project was begun mid-October with the idea of making a _takeover_ of the Pale Garden from MC 1.21.4, but (as always) with a lot of **USELESS THINGS**! :D

This mod **IS NOT A DWELLER RESKIN** because it has cool mechanics : (


_I've had to literally write **DWELLER** because in this way my mod has a bigger chance to appear to even more people. I'm feeling sick right now just for doing this. ; )_

_If you want to keep updated, I'll recommend you follow my YouTube or my TikTok to know new things I'm developing. ;)_

_If you find any bugs, please let me know so I can fix them. ;)_
